texto: There are times when your body takes control. Times when the gazelle says, ‘Fuck you, lioness,’ and delivers the biggest kick of its whole gazelley life.

texto: These are tears and I am crying.It is not a painful sensation, as I always thought it must be. It feels like the purest expression of feeling that it is possible to have. And the feeling mixes everything up together. Happiness. Sadness. Relief. Sorrow. Love. A mixture if things no psychiatrist ever felt. It is the most wonderful mixture in the world.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Harry Bingham: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “These are tears and I am crying.It is not a painful sensation, as I always thought it must be. It…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que felicidade, emotions, feelings pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de feelings.
